ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "provider_number" TEXT /* Provider number of the hospital */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address_1" TEXT /* First line of the hospital's address */,
  "address_2" TEXT /* Second line of the hospital's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hospital is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hospital is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the hospital's location */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* County where the hospital is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the hospital */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hospital's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hospital's location */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital (e.g., general, specialized, teaching) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_rates" (
  "mortality_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality rate */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the mortality rate belongs to */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for which the mortality rate is calculated (e.g., heart attack, heart failure, pneumonia) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Mortality rate for the hospital */,
  "comparison_to_us_rate" TEXT /* Comparison of the hospital's mortality rate to the US national rate */,
  "lower_estimate" REAL /* Lower estimate of the mortality rate */,
  "upper_estimate" REAL /* Upper estimate of the mortality rate */,
  "number_of_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients used to calculate the mortality rate */,
  "footnote" TEXT /* Footnote for the mortality rate (e.g., number of cases too small) */,
  "national_average" REAL /* National average mortality rate for comparison */,
  "state_average" REAL /* State average mortality rate for comparison */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the mortality rate is calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "readmission_rates" (
  "readmission_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readmission rate */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the readmission rate belongs to */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for which the readmission rate is calculated (e.g., heart attack, heart failure, pneumonia) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Readmission rate for the hospital */,
  "comparison_to_us_rate" TEXT /* Comparison of the hospital's readmission rate to the US national rate */,
  "lower_estimate" REAL /* Lower estimate of the readmission rate */,
  "upper_estimate" REAL /* Upper estimate of the readmission rate */,
  "number_of_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients used to calculate the readmission rate */,
  "footnote" TEXT /* Footnote for the readmission rate (e.g., number of cases too small) */,
  "national_average" REAL /* National average readmission rate for comparison */,
  "state_average" REAL /* State average readmission rate for comparison */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the readmission rate is calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readmission_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readmission_rates_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readmission_rates_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., heart attack, heart failure, pneumonia) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_ratings" (
  "hospital_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital rating */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the rating belongs to */,
  "overall_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the hospital */,
  "mortality_rating" REAL /* Mortality rating of the hospital */,
  "readmission_rating" REAL /* Readmission rating of the hospital */,
  "patient_satisfaction_rating" REAL /* Patient satisfaction rating of the hospital */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., CMS, Leapfrog) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_ratings_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_satisfaction" (
  "patient_satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient satisfaction rating */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the rating belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Patient satisfaction rating of the hospital */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey used to calculate patient satisfaction */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_satisfaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_satisfaction_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the administrator belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the administrator (e.g., CEO, CMO) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_administrators_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., patient, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital searched */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "search_criteria" TEXT /* Search criteria used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_search_history_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compare_hospitals" (
  "compare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the comparison */,
  "hospital_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first hospital compared */,
  "hospital_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second hospital compared */,
  "compare_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was performed */,
  "comparison_criteria" TEXT /* Comparison criteria used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compare_hospitals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compare_hospitals_hospital_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id_1") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compare_hospitals_hospital_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id_2") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_performance_over_time" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the performance belongs to */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for which the performance is calculated (e.g., heart attack, heart failure, pneumonia) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Performance rate of the hospital */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the performance was calculated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the performance data was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_performance_over_time_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_performance_over_time_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_ratings_over_time" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the rating belongs to */,
  "overall_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the hospital */,
  "mortality_rating" REAL /* Mortality rating of the hospital */,
  "readmission_rating" REAL /* Readmission rating of the hospital */,
  "patient_satisfaction_rating" REAL /* Patient satisfaction rating of the hospital */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the rating was calculated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the rating data was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_ratings_over_time_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_specialties" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the specialty belongs to */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty offered by the hospital (e.g., cardiology, oncology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id", "specialty")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_services" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the service belongs to */,
  "service" TEXT /* Service offered by the hospital (e.g., emergency department, ICU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id", "service")
)
